GET /api.description: serves up a json representation of all the available endpoints of the api

GET /api/topics.description: serves an array of all topics

GET /api/articles.description: serves an array of all articles and its properties with an added property counting the ammount of comments  in descending order based on date created

GET /api/users.description: serves an object with the key of users and the value of an array of objects. Each object should have the properties: username name and avatar_url

/api/articles/:article_id/comments.description: Get all comments for a specific article, most recent first

/api/articles/:article_id.description: Update the votes for a specific article

article.title: Eight pug gifs that remind me of mitch
article.author: icellusedkars
